valid: For the period 00:00 (UTC) on Sun 12 Jul 2026 to 00:00 (UTC) on Mon 13 Jul 2026
general_synopsis: High just west of Rockall 1032 expected Fair Isle 1034 by 1800 Sunday. New lows expected south FitzRoy 1009 and southwest France 1008 by same time
